title: Ahtna Recruits CEO for Ahtna Netiye’
summary: Tom Maloney, Ahtna Netiye’s CEO, has announced plans to retire in 2023 following over seven years of service to the company and a diverse 45-year career. title: Four residents at the Yukon-Kuskokwim Elders Home test positive for COVID-19
